role_summary: Test module validating the directory traversal and file filtering logic of the TraversalEngine component.
extracted_finding: The TraversalEngine implements domain-specific filtering rules during directory traversal, including a minimum file size threshold (files smaller than 64 bytes are ignored) and explicit exclusion of dependency directories such as 'node_modules'. The engine returns filtered file paths alongside a metadata summary object containing counts like file_count, ensuring only relevant source files are processed downstream.
